message:
fix: merge --metadata with existing metadata instead of replacing (GH#2423)

bd update --metadata now merges new keys into existing metadata instead
of replacing the entire object, preventing silent data loss of existing
metadata keys.

Co-Authored-By: mrmaxsteel <mrmaxsteel@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
